name: Rigetti Computing, Inc.
description: Rigetti Computing พัฒนา quantum computers แบบ superconducting qubit ให้บริการผ่าน cloud (QCS — Quantum Cloud Services) ร่วมกับ hybrid classical-quantum algorithms เน้นตลาด enterprise และ government ในสหรัฐฯ และยุโรป

notes.title: 10-K Analysis
notes.content:
[Financial Performance]
Rigetti is transitioning from R&D to initial commercialization, marked by its first QPU sales and growing purchase orders, though revenue remains concentrated in public sector contracts. The company emphasizes technological progress, with improvements in qubit count and gate fidelity, but faces significant cash needs and execution risks in a competitive, emerging market. Strategic partnerships and vertical integration aim to accelerate path to quantum advantage, yet financial sustainability hinges on scaling commercial adoption and managing burn rate.

[Performance Drivers]
Growth was driven by commercialization of quantum processing units (QPUs), particularly the Novera QPU launch in December 2023, which generated $5.7 million in purchase orders in 2025. The company also benefited from technological advancements including the 84-qubit Ankaa-3 system launch and achievement of key fidelity milestones (99.0% median two-qubit gate fidelity), enhancing product competitiveness.

[Strategic Priorities]
• Advance quantum computing technology — focus on scaling qubit counts and improving gate fidelity through proprietary chiplet architecture
• Expand commercial sales — increase QPU deployments to academic, government, and enterprise customers
• Strengthen partnerships — leverage collaborations with entities like Quanta Computer for manufacturing and Innovate UK for quantum error correction

[Competitive Position]
Rigetti differentiates through its vertically integrated model, including Fab-1 wafer fabrication facility and proprietary superconducting qubit technology with fast gate speeds (50-70 nanoseconds). The company claims a moat in modular chip architecture, demonstrated with the Cepheus-1-36Q multi-chip quantum computer. Competitive threats include global quantum computing rivals and technological hurdles in achieving quantum advantage.

[Management Quality]
Execution score: MEDIUM
Management delivered on key technological milestones, such as launching the 84-qubit Ankaa-3 system and achieving improved gate fidelities, but the company remains in early stages with ongoing cash burn and dependence on future capital raises, as noted in risk factors.

[Outlook]
Management signals continued focus on scaling quantum systems, with specific guidance on deploying a 108-qubit quantum computer to C-DAC in India in second half of 2026 and ongoing investments in partnerships like the Quanta collaboration.

[Key Risks]
RGTI faces a high-risk profile characterized by its early-stage operations, significant funding requirements, and substantial technical challenges in quantum computing development. The company's heavy dependence on limited customers and public sector contracts creates revenue concentration risks, while intense global competition and intellectual property concerns add further uncertainty. Material weaknesses in financial controls and supply chain dependencies present additional operational vulnerabilities that could impact growth and stability.

[Management Tone]
Bullish

notes.title: Earnings Call Analysis
notes.content:
[Financial Performance]
Rigetti continues to invest heavily in R&D while building commercial momentum, with FY2025 revenue of $7.1 million overshadowed by substantial operating and net losses. The company maintains a strong cash position of $589.8 million to fund its ambitious roadmap. Key themes include the transition from pure research to commercial deployments, with government and research institutions emerging as early adopters of on-premises systems. Management's confidence stems from technological breakthroughs in fidelity and scaling, though the path to profitability remains distant as the quantum computing market develops.

[Performance Drivers]
Revenue growth was driven by increasing demand for on-premises quantum systems from government and research institutions, particularly through large orders like the $8.4 million C-DAC system. The company's chiplet-based architecture and proprietary manufacturing capabilities enabled continued technology scaling and fidelity improvements, supporting customer adoption.

[Strategic Priorities]
• Achieving practical quantum advantage through fidelity and scaling improvements
• Expanding on-premises system deployments to government and research customers
• Advancing chiplet architecture for scalable quantum systems
• Maintaining vertical integration through Fab-1 manufacturing facility

[Competitive Position]
Rigetti's open modular architecture and chiplet-based approach provide differentiation in scalability, while their vertically integrated Fab-1 facility creates manufacturing advantages. Their superconducting qubits offer 1000x faster gate speeds than trapped ion alternatives, though competition in quantum computing remains intense with multiple modalities vying for leadership.

[Management Quality]
Execution score: MEDIUM
Management delivered on technology milestones including 99.9% two-qubit gate fidelity and progress toward 108-qubit system deployment, though financial losses remain substantial. They secured significant new orders (C-DAC, Novera systems) demonstrating commercial traction.

[Outlook]
Management anticipates significant Q1 year-over-year revenue growth from shipping $5.7 million in Novera system orders. They remain focused on deploying the 108-qubit system at 99.5% median fidelity and advancing toward larger-scale systems.

[Key Risks]
RGTI faces significant technological and execution risks as it pursues quantum computing leadership, with high-severity concerns around achieving technological milestones, product delivery, and financial sustainability. The company operates in an emerging market with substantial competitive and economic uncertainties, though it maintains strong cash reserves and strategic partnerships to mitigate some risks. Overall, the risk profile reflects a pre-revenue technology company in a capital-intensive, rapidly evolving industry.

[Management Tone]
Bullish

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: Our mission is to build the world's most powerful computers to help solve humanity's most important and pressing problems. Our strategy is to be at the forefront of superconducting quantum computing.

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: We believe quantum computing represents one of the most transformative emerging capabilities in the world today. By leveraging quantum mechanics, our quantum computers process information in fundamentally new, more powerful ways compared to classical computing with meaningful power efficiency.

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: We expect this patented and patent pending modular chip architecture to be the building block for new generations of quantum processors that we expect to achieve an advantage over classical computers.

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: In 2025, we received purchase orders for two Novera systems totaling approximately $5.7 million. Both systems are upgradeable, allowing the customers to increase the system qubit count for more complex computations and research.

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: We achieved a key two-qubit gate fidelity milestone with Ankaa-3: successfully halving error rates in 2024 to achieve a 99.0% median two-qubit gate fidelity based on our internal testing.

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: As of January 2026, we achieved a 99.6% median two-qubit gate fidelity (based on internal testing) with Cepheus-1-36Q, successfully halving our error rate from our previous, single-chip 84-qubit Ankaa-3 system.

quotes.speaker: Management (Overview)
quotes.quote: Leveraging our full-stack platform and in-house quantum foundry capabilities, we believe that Cepheus-1-36Q demonstrates our ability to deliver increasingly higher performance quantum computers with larger qubit counts using our proprietary chiplet-based architecture.

quotes.speaker: Management (Risk Factors)
quotes.quote: We are in our early stages and have a limited operating history, which makes it difficult to forecast our future results of operations. We have in the past failed to meet publicly announced milestones and may fail to meet projected technological milestones in the future.

quotes.speaker: Management (Risk Factors)
quotes.quote: We will require a significant amount of cash for expenditures as we invest in ongoing research and development and business operations and may need additional capital sooner than planned. If we are unable to raise additional funding when needed, we may be required to delay, limit or substantially reduce our quantum computing development efforts.

quotes.speaker: Management (Risk Factors)
quotes.quote: We may not be able to scale our business quickly enough to meet customer and market demand, which would result in lower profitability or cause us to fail to execute on our business strategies.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: In 2025, we made great progress across fidelity, scale, and system architecture.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: Our focus continues to be on achieving practical quantum advantage, and over the past year we validated key elements of our strategy, including improved two-qubit gate fidelity across both monolithic and chiplet-based systems and continued momentum in scaling our superconducting quantum technology.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: Demand for on-premises quantum systems from government and research institutions continues to grow.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: Rigetti's open and modular architecture remains a core differentiator.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: Our chiplet-based approach provides a practical and scalable path toward large-scale quantum systems, while our ecosystem of partners, including Riverlane, NVIDIA, Quanta Computer, and QphoX, allows us to innovate across the stack.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: Looking ahead, we remain focused on executing our roadmap, including the deployment of our 108-qubit system at 99.5% median two-qubit gate fidelity and advancing toward larger-scale systems as we work steadily toward quantum advantage.

quotes.speaker: Dr. Subodh Kulkarni (CEO)
quotes.quote: We anticipate significant first-quarter year-over-year revenue growth driven by a portion of the previously announced $5.7 million Novera on-premises system purchase orders expected to ship in Q1.

quotes.speaker: Document (Business Update)
quotes.quote: Rigetti announced an approximately $8.4 million purchase order from India's Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC) for a 108-qubit on-premises superconducting quantum computer.

quotes.speaker: Document (Technology Milestones)
quotes.quote: Rigetti recently achieved a two-qubit gate fidelity as high as 99.9% at 28 nanosecond gate speed on a prototype platform using its new proprietary adiabatic CZ scheme.

quotes.speaker: Document (Technology Milestones)
quotes.quote: Chiplet-based systems enable Rigetti to increase qubit counts while maintaining control over chip uniformity, reducing manufacturing complexity, and improving fabrication yield, an approach the Company believes represents the most viable path toward large-scale quantum systems.

roadmap.commitment: Achieve milestones and technological advancements, including executing on technology roadmap and developing practical applications
Monetize investments in quantum computing
Accelerate development of multiple generations of quantum processors
Execute on business strategy, including monetization of products
Grow and manage growth profitably
Implement strategic initiatives, expansion plans and continue to innovate existing products and services
Expand or maintain existing customer base
Scale business quickly enough to meet customer and market demand
Complete development of quantum computers, produce quantum computers at scale, achieve targeted performance milestones and realize quantum advantage
Compete successfully through continuous innovation, timely execution of strategy and achieving cost reduction
Attract and retain senior executive leadership and other key employees such as quantum physicists, software engineers and other key technical employees
Deploy 108-qubit quantum computer to C-DAC in Bengaluru in second half of 2026
Continue to improve system performance
Deploy 108-qubit system at 99.5% median two-qubit gate fidelity
Advance toward larger-scale systems as we work steadily toward quantum advantage
Anticipate significant first-quarter year-over-year revenue growth driven by a portion of the previously announced $5.7 million Novera on-premises system purchase orders expected to ship in Q1
108-qubit on-premises superconducting quantum computer for C-DAC expected to be deployed in the second half of 2026
Novera QPU from Japanese research organization delivery expected in April 2026
Novera on-premises systems will be upgradeable, enabling customers to scale system capabilities over time
Chiplet tiling represents the most viable path toward large-scale quantum systems
Enhancements to 108-qubit chiplet-based system bolster confidence in deploying the 108-qubit system and reinforce path toward customer readiness
Continued progress on fidelity, speed, and error mitigation techniques is critical to achieving practical quantum advantage
Fab-1 will accelerate our roadmap, support proprietary innovation, and create a durable competitive advantage as systems grow in scale and complexity
Chiplet-based approach provides a practical and scalable path toward large-scale quantum systems
Ecosystem of partners (Riverlane, NVIDIA, Quanta Computer, and QphoX) allows us to innovate across the stack
Focus on achieving practical quantum advantage

overview.business_model_summary: Rigetti Computing พัฒนา quantum computers แบบ superconducting qubit ที่ต้องการ dilution refrigerator ทำงานใกล้ absolute zero (~15 millikelvin) ให้บริการผ่าน Quantum Cloud Services (QCS) บน AWS, Azure และ direct cloud access รูปแบบธุรกิจ: SaaS + hardware sales (Novera QPU on-premises) + government contracts บริษัทเป็น vertically integrated ตั้งแต่ chip design → Fab-1 fabrication facility → deployment บน cloud
overview.competitive_position: Rigetti แข่งขันในตลาด superconducting quantum computing ร่วมกับ IBM (Eagle/Heron), Google (Willow) และ startups เช่น IonQ (trapped ion) และ D-Wave (annealing) จุดแข็งคือ chiplet-based modular architecture ที่เชื่อว่าจะ scale ได้ดีกว่า monolithic approach และมี in-house Fab-1 fabrication facility ที่ทำให้ iteration cycle เร็วกว่าการพึ่ง third-party fabs
moat_factors: Fab-1 in-house quantum chip fabrication — ทำให้ iterate hardware ได้เร็วและควบคุม IP ได้เต็มที่
Chiplet modular architecture — patent-pending approach สำหรับ scale qubit count ข้ามรุ่น
Quantum Cloud Services (QCS) — API + SDK ecosystem ที่นักวิจัย/นักพัฒนาใช้งานอยู่แล้ว
Partnership ecosystem — NVIDIA (CUDA-Q), Quanta Computer (manufacturing), Riverlane (error correction), QphoX

segments.name: Quantum Cloud Services (QCS)
segments.description: บริการ QPU access ผ่าน cloud — นักวิจัย, academic, enterprise เข้าถึง quantum computer บน AWS และ Azure ชำระเป็น pay-per-use

segments.name: On-Premises QPU (Novera / 108-qubit)
segments.description: ขาย hardware โดยตรง — Novera QPU 9-qubit สำหรับ R&D labs, 108-qubit system สำหรับ government/enterprise เช่น C-DAC (India) และ Japanese research org

segments.name: Government & Research Contracts
segments.description: DARPA, DOE, AFRL contracts สำหรับ quantum computing R&D — มักเป็น milestone-based payment และสร้าง credibility

geographies.note: Government contracts + academic + enterprise cloud users
Innovate UK partnership, European quantum initiative programs
C-DAC India (108-qubit deployment), Japanese research org (Novera)

management.name: Subodh Kulkarni
management.title: CEO
management.note: เข้ารับตำแหน่ง CEO ในปี 2023 มาจาก Cohu Inc. — เน้น commercial execution และ path-to-revenue มากกว่า pure research

management.name: Jeff Bertolucci
management.title: CFO
management.note: บริหารการเงินในช่วง heavy R&D spending — ดูแล balance sheet ที่มี cash $589.8M (FY2025) สำหรับ runway ยาว

management.name: David Rivas
management.title: CTO
management.note: นำทีม quantum hardware development — responsible for chiplet architecture และ fidelity improvements (99.6% 2Q gate fidelity บน Cepheus-1)

timeline.title: ก่อตั้ง Rigetti Computing
timeline.description: Chad Rigetti ก่อตั้งบริษัทใน Berkeley, CA หลังออกจาก IBM Quantum Lab — ด้วย vision สร้าง superconducting quantum computer เชิงพาณิชย์และ full-stack platform

timeline.title: เปิดตัว Forest SDK + QVM (Quantum Virtual Machine)
timeline.description: เปิดตัว pyQuil programming language และ Quantum Virtual Machine เป็นรายแรกที่ให้ public access quantum computing ผ่าน cloud — สร้าง developer community ตั้งแต่เนิ่นๆ

timeline.title: เปิด Quantum Cloud Services (QCS) เชิงพาณิชย์
timeline.description: QCS เปิดให้บริการ commercial access บน dedicated quantum processors — เป็นหนึ่งในบริษัทแรกที่ให้ real quantum hardware access ผ่าน cloud แบบ pay-per-use

timeline.title: เปิด Fab-1 — In-House Quantum Chip Fabrication
timeline.description: เปิด fabrication facility ของตัวเองใน Fremont, CA สำหรับผลิต superconducting qubit chips — ทำให้ Rigetti เป็นหนึ่งในน้อยรายที่มี in-house quantum fab ลด dependency บน NIST และ university fabs

timeline.title: SPAC Merger กับ Supernova Partners II — เข้า NASDAQ
timeline.description: Rigetti เข้าตลาด NASDAQ ผ่าน SPAC merger กับ Supernova Partners Acquisition Company II ระดมทุน ~$261M — เปิดทางสู่ public funding สำหรับ R&D ที่ใช้เงินสูง

timeline.title: เปิดตัว Novera QPU — On-Premises 9-Qubit System
timeline.description: Novera QPU เป็น on-premises quantum computer ที่ขายได้จริงสำหรับ research labs — ราคา $900K สามารถ upgrade qubit count ในอนาคต ถือเป็น first hardware product ที่มี recurring revenue

timeline.title: Subodh Kulkarni ขึ้นเป็น CEO — Pivot สู่ Commercialization
timeline.description: Chad Rigetti ออกจาก CEO ตำแหน่ง Subodh Kulkarni (อดีต CEO Cohu) เข้ามาแทน — signaling shift จาก pure research เป็น commercial execution และ revenue growth

timeline.title: เปิดตัว Ankaa-3 (84-qubit) — Gate Fidelity 99.0%
timeline.description: Ankaa-3 บรรลุ 99.0% median two-qubit gate fidelity — halving error rate จากรุ่นก่อน เป็น milestone สำคัญบนเส้นทางสู่ quantum advantage สำหรับ practical applications

timeline.title: Cepheus-1-36Q Multi-Chip System — Gate Fidelity 99.6%
timeline.description: เปิดตัว Cepheus-1-36Q ที่ใช้ chiplet modular architecture — บรรลุ 99.6% median 2Q gate fidelity เป็น proof-of-concept ว่า chiplet approach ทำงานได้จริงและ scale ได้

timeline.title: ATM Equity Offering — Cash Position $589.8M
timeline.description: Rigetti ระดมทุนผ่าน at-the-money equity offering ทำให้มี cash $589.8M ณ สิ้น FY2025 — เพิ่ม runway หลายปีสำหรับ technology development โดยไม่ต้องกังวลเรื่อง near-term solvency

timeline.title: 108-Qubit System สำหรับ C-DAC India (H2 2026)
timeline.description: กำลัง deploy 108-qubit system ให้ C-DAC (Centre for Development of Advanced Computing) ในอินเดีย ที่ 99.5% gate fidelity — เป็น largest commercial deployment ในประวัติศาสตร์ Rigetti

bull_case: Cash runway แข็งแกร่ง $589.8M (FY2025) — ไม่ต้องกังวลเรื่อง dilutive raise ในระยะ 3-4 ปีข้างหน้า ให้ time เพียงพอสำหรับ technology development
Chiplet modular architecture — viable path เดียวที่ชัดเจนสู่ 1000+ qubit systems โดยไม่ต้องเพิ่ม error rate เชิงเส้น
Gate fidelity milestone ต่อเนื่อง — 99.0% (Ankaa-3 2024) → 99.6% (Cepheus-1 2025) แสดง execution capability ที่ดี
First mover ใน on-premises QPU hardware sales (Novera) — สร้าง revenue stream ที่ทำซ้ำได้และ upgrade path สำหรับลูกค้า
Partnership ecosystem ระดับโลก — NVIDIA (CUDA-Q integration), Quanta Computer (manufacturing scale), Riverlane (error correction)
Government contracts เป็น backstop revenue — DARPA, DOE สร้าง credibility และ IP ที่ต่อยอดได้
Quantum computing TAM กำลัง materialize — BCG คาด $850B+ ภายในปี 2040 บริษัทที่ achieve quantum advantage ก่อนจะ capture value asymmetrically
bear_case: Revenue ยังเล็กมาก $7.1M (FY2025) — burn rate ~$50M/ปี แม้มี cash runway แต่ต้องการ 7-10 ปีกว่าจะ breakeven
IBM และ Google มีทรัพยากรเหนือกว่ามหาศาล — IBM มี 1000+ qubit Eagle/Heron, Google มี Willow ที่ demonstrate quantum advantage แล้ว
Material weakness ใน internal controls — ยังไม่แก้ไขครบ อาจกระทบ investor confidence และ audit quality
Revenue concentration สูง — พึ่ง handful of government/research customers สำหรับรายได้หลัก การหมดสัญญา 1-2 รายกระทบ materialy
Quantum advantage timeline ไม่แน่นอน — ถ้า fault-tolerant quantum computing ล่าช้าออกไปอีก 10 ปี stock อาจ de-rate อย่างรุนแรง
IonQ และ D-Wave แข่งขันใน different approach — ลูกค้าบางส่วนอาจเลือก trapped-ion (IonQ) ที่ room-temperature qubit มีข้อได้เปรียบบางด้าน

key_risks.description: Revenue $7.1M (FY2025) เทียบกับ R&D spend $49.75M และ operating loss $68.5M — บริษัทยังไกลจาก profitability มาก ต้องการ technological breakthrough เพื่อ scale revenue
ต้องระดมทุนต่อเนื่องเพื่อ fund R&D และ operations แม้ปัจจุบันมี $589.8M cash แต่ burn rate ~$50-60M/ปี ในระยะยาวยังต้องหา revenue model ที่ sustainable
ยังไม่มีหลักฐานชัดว่า superconducting approach ของ Rigetti จะ achieve fault-tolerant quantum computing ก่อน IBM/Google หรือ approach อื่น (trapped-ion, photonic)
พึ่ง limited number of customers สำหรับ significant portion ของ revenue โดยเฉพาะ government contracts ที่มี renewal risk
IBM มี roadmap ชัดสู่ 100,000 qubits และ budgets ระดับ billions Google Willow demonstrate quantum advantage แล้ว — Rigetti เป็น distant third ใน superconducting race
บริษัทระบุ material weaknesses ใน internal controls over financial reporting ซึ่งอาจ lead to errors หรือ restatements และลด investor confidence
แม้มี Fab-1 in-house แต่ยังพึ่ง specialized suppliers สำหรับ dilution refrigerators (Bluefors), microwave components และ other quantum-specific hardware

ownership.note: RGTI เป็น small-cap quantum computing company สถาบันถือครองปานกลาง
ownership.insider_ownership: ~5% (ผู้บริหารและผู้ก่อตั้ง)
